curation_notes: Advisory explicitly names product/card.php and the statut parameter. The patch fixes multiple unsanitized GETPOST() calls in card.php by adding type filters (int, alpha, aZ09). It also adds SQL injection filtering to the $filter parameter of select_thirdparty_list() in html.form.class.php via the test_sql_and_script_inject() function. The main.inc.php and societe/ajax/company.php changes are supporting improvements to the sanitization infrastructure. Noisy patch: 4 non-test source files changed. Pre-assigned vuln_class sql-injection is correct per CWE-89 and the advisory description.
